scripts.test:unit: node --import tsx --test src/server/extraction.unit.test.ts src/server/push-endpoint.unit.test.ts src/server/identity.unit.test.ts src/server/shares.unit.test.ts src/server/recipe-parse.unit.test.ts src/server/recipe-import.unit.test.ts src/server/plan-scale.unit.test.ts src/server/shopping-generate.unit.test.ts src/server/circles-reach.unit.test.ts src/server/share-reach.unit.test.ts src/server/reconcile-math.unit.test.ts src/server/vcard.unit.test.ts src/server/mail/dev-filter.unit.test.ts src/server/mail/pipeline.unit.test.ts src/lib/barcode.unit.test.ts src/lib/money.unit.test.ts src/server/mfa/crypto.unit.test.ts src/server/mfa/totp.unit.test.ts src/server/mfa/backup.unit.test.ts src/server/mfa/email-code.unit.test.ts src/server/mail/unsub.unit.test.ts src/server/notify/defaults.unit.test.ts src/server/deeplink.unit.test.ts src/server/digest-due.unit.test.ts src/server/attachments.unit.test.ts src/server/media-positions.unit.test.ts src/lib/phone.unit.test.ts src/lib/phone.edge.unit.test.ts src/app/recipes/steps.unit.test.ts src/app/linkified.unit.test.ts
scripts.e2e:off: docker compose down && SEED_DEMO=1 EXTRACTION_MODE=off docker compose up -d --wait && playwright test slice5 -g 'off mode'; s=$?; docker compose down; exit $s
scripts.e2e:mail: docker compose down && SEED_DEMO=1 MAIL_MODE=live MAIL_DEV_ALLOWLIST=. EXTRACTION_MODE=fixture docker compose up -d --wait && set -a && . ./.env && set +a && MAIL_LIVE=1 playwright test mail -g 'real send'; s=$?; docker compose down; exit $s
